items.title: Lululemon Athletica vs. Nike: What Revenue Trends Reveal for These Sportswear Stocks
items.summary: Nike maintains significantly higher revenue than Lululemon Athletica, with both companies showing consistent seasonal patterns. However, both face challenges with flat or reduced growth outlooks. Lululemon reduced its 2026 sales guidance to flat, while Nike's Q3 revenue was flat year-over-year. Both stocks have dropped near 52-week lows, though Lululemon shows more quarters with year-over-year growth. Nike offers a dividend yield of 3.9% with 24 consecutive years of increases.
